title: Authorisation application deadlines for Christmas period 2025
body: "Validation during the Christmas Period 2025  The following deadlines apply to applications so that they can be processed during the Christmas period:  New Marketing Authorisation (MA) applications  The last validation meeting to discuss applications for new MAs will take place on 11 December. New MA applications to be considered for validation must be received on or before 8 December.  Weekly validation meetings will resume from 8 January 2026.  Other Marketing Authorisation related applications, including batch release and variation applications  All applications must be received by 12 December.  Normal services will resume from the week commencing 5 January 2026.  For further information contact s.response@vmd.gov.uk  Manufacturing and Wholesale Dealer Authorisation applications  The last day for validation of applications for Authorisations for Manufacturers, Blood Banks, Equine Stem Cell Centres and Wholesale Dealers (new and variations) will be 11 December.  Your application must reach us by 8 December.  The validation discussions will resume from 5 January 2026.  For further information contact inspections@vmd.gov.uk  Export Certificates  Your application for an export certificate must be received by 17 December.  Applications received after this date will be dealt with from 5 January 2026.  For further information contact exportcert@vmd.gov.uk.  General enquiries Please send any general enquiries to postmaster@vmd.gov.uk, using key words in the subject heading. "
